value.body:
## Context

Assigned agent work should be reviewable from the ticket, not hidden in a chat transcript or process log.

## Outcome

Ticket detail shows live agent events, generated artifacts, branch/worktree metadata, testing notes, and final handoff summaries.

## Acceptance criteria

- Agent task events stream into ticket-linked UI while a run is active.
- Final handoff notes are persisted as a ticket record or comment with summary, testing, branch, and limitations.
- Artifacts have stable names, timestamps, provider/source metadata, and safe open/copy actions.
- Renderer handles reconnect/reload without duplicating events.
- Tests cover event ordering, reconnect behavior, and final handoff rendering.

frontmatter.title: Stream agent run logs, artifacts, and handoff notes into tickets

value.title: Stream agent run logs, artifacts, and handoff notes into tickets
